heading: Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship Program
label: 1445c–1 Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship Program

CodificationFor similar provisions relating to the Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship Program, see .section 1445c of this titleSection was enacted as part of the Department of Commerce and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2001, and also as part of the Departments of Commerce, Justice, and State, the Judiciary, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2001, and not as part of the National Marine Sanctuaries Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary of Commerce shall establish and administer through the National Ocean Service the Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship Program. Under the program, the Secretary shall award graduate education scholarships in marine biology, oceanography, or maritime archaeology, including the curation, preservation, and display of maritime artifacts, to be known as “Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarships”.

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: b Purpose
children.text: The purpose of the Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship Program is to recognize outstanding scholarship in marine biology, oceanography, or maritime archaeology, particularly by women and members of minority groups, and encourage independent graduate level research in such fields of study.
shall be used to support a candidate’s graduate studies in marine biology, oceanography, or maritime archaeology at a sponsoring institution; and
shall be made available to individual candidates in accordance with guidelines issued by the Secretary.

children.heading: Distribution of funds
children.label: d Distribution of funds
children.text: The amount of each Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarship shall be provided directly to each recipient selected by the Secretary upon receipt of certification that the recipient will adhere to a specific and detailed plan of study and research approved by the sponsoring institution.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: e Funding
children.text: The Secretary shall make 1 percent of the amount appropriated each fiscal year to carry out the National Marine Sanctuaries Act [ et seq.] available for Dr. Nancy Foster Scholarships.16 U.S.C. 1431

children.heading: Scholarship repayment requirement
children.label: f Scholarship repayment requirement
children.text: Repayment of the award shall be made to the Secretary in the case of fraud or noncompliance.
